title: covillea glutinosa
intro: Covillea glutinosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as sticky broom. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and other microorganisms. The health benefits of Covillea glutinosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Covillea glutinosa can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
